'''Ak-Buz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] who was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]], [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']]. He was [[Death/Legends|murdered]] by [[Dannik Jerriko]] and his body was found by the [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] [[Chef/Legends|chef]], [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]]. [[Gartogg/Legends|Gartogg]] the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] saw Porcellus standing over Ak-Buz's body, and was told that the Weequay had fallen [[Sleep/Legends|asleep]]. Porcellus then hid the body in a garbage heap. The body was later found by [[Barada/Legends|Barada]].
